name: Hanuman Chalisa
title: Hanuman Chalisa Lyrics in Hindi | श्री हनुमान चालीसा
description: The most powerful and popular devotional hymn dedicated to Lord Hanuman, composed by Goswami Tulsidas. The Hanuman Chalisa consists of 40 verses (chaupais) that praise Lord Hanuman's strength, devotion, and divine powers.
significance: Removes obstacles, provides strength, courage, and protection from evil forces. Reciting it brings peace and prosperity.

seo.description: Complete Hanuman Chalisa with lyrics in Hindi and English, meaning, and benefits. Learn the proper way to recite Hanuman Chalisa.
seo.title: Hanuman Chalisa | Hanuman Bhajan with Lyrics

sections.title: Shri Hanuman Chalisa
sections.content: The Hanuman Chalisa is a powerful devotional hymn of 40 verses praising Lord Hanuman, the mighty devotee of Lord Rama who embodies strength, devotion, and selfless service.

sections.title: Historical Significance
sections.content: The Hanuman Chalisa was composed by Goswami Tulsidas in the 16th century. It has been recited for centuries by millions of devotees seeking Hanuman's blessings and protection.

sections.title: Complete Chalisa Lyrics
sections.content: The complete 40 verses of Hanuman Chalisa with Doha and Chopai.
sections.hindi: श्रीगुरु चरन सरोज रज , निजमन मुकुरु सुधारि। बरनउं रघुबर बिमल जसु, जो दायक फल चारि।। बुद्धिहीन तनु जानिके, सुमिरौं पवन-कुमार। बल बुद्धि बिद्या देहु मोहिं, हरहु कलेस बिकार।।
sections.english: Having polished the mirror of my heart with the dust of my guru's lotus feet, I sing the pure fame of the best of the Raghu dynasty, which bestows the four fruits of life. Knowing my body to be devoid of intelligence, I remember Hanuman, the son of the Wind God. Grant me strength, intelligence, and knowledge, and remove all my afflictions and sins.
sections.meaning: The opening verses invoke the guru's blessings and dedicate the Chalisa to Lord Hanuman, seeking his divine gifts.

sections.title: Benefits of Reciting Hanuman Chalisa
sections.content: The spiritual and practical benefits of regular recitation.

items.description: Removes negative energies, provides spiritual protection, enhances devotion, and brings peace of mind.
Removes obstacles, brings success in endeavors, provides courage and strength, and protects from dangers.

sections.title: How to Recite
sections.content: Proper method and guidelines for reciting Hanuman Chalisa.
steps: Best Time: Early morning after bath, or evening after sunset. Tuesday and Saturday are especially auspicious.
Procedure: Sit facing north or east, light a diya, offer flowers and prasad, then recite with devotion and concentration.
sections.bestTime: Early morning after bath, or evening after sunset. Tuesday and Saturday are especially auspicious.
sections.duration: Proper method and guidelines for reciting Hanuman Chalisa.
